evidence.correctness_and_freshness: Uses current signInWithPassword (v2) and explicitly notes v1 signIn is deprecated. JWT decode with HS256 + audience='authenticated' is internally consistent. No version pin claimed for @supabase/supabase-js though canonical constraint asks for pinned versions.
evidence.executability: Code is syntactically valid; imports present; HS256 verification with PyJWT works; CORS configured; no sandbox-infeasible patterns (no ngrok/brew/sudo).
evidence.completeness: All 6 pieces present: keys acquisition with URL+menu path, install commands, .env templates (split frontend/backend), backend code, frontend code, test commands. Env var names consistent. Minor: npm install lacks pinned version per constraint (b), and no pip version pins.
evidence.citation_anchoring: Only a single link to app.supabase.com dashboard; no link to supabase.com/docs near the code. No official documentation URLs cited.

rubric_notes: Solid, executable playbook. Minor deductions: missing pinned package versions despite constraint (b), and no official docs URL anchoring near code.
